## `/about`

I build at the seam where ML meets systems — neural nets, compilers, things with zero dependencies. Based in NYC.

> *Ship it, then make it weird.*

## `/projects`

| <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/ASL-Alpha-NeuralNet">🧏 ASL-Alpha-NeuralNet</a></b><br/><sub>CNN that reads American Sign Language letters from a webcam. Accessibility + vision.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ data curation beat every architecture change I tried</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Python · TensorFlow · CV</code></sub> | <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/Compiler-TinyJ">⚙️ Compiler-TinyJ</a></b><br/><sub>A tiny Java compiler. Lexer → parser → codegen, end to end. From scratch.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ parser is boring; codegen is where you learn how computers work</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Java · Compilers</code></sub> |
| <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/Palate">🍽️ Palate</a></b><br/><sub>Full-stack React app for food discovery. Team project.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ modeling taste as latent preference beats explicit tags</i></sub><br/><sub><code>React · Node · JS</code></sub> | <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/EtsyScraper">🧵 EtsyScraper</a></b><br/><sub>Web scraper built with only the Java JDK. No third-party libs. Pure grit.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ constraint-driven projects are the fastest way to understand a stack</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Java · HTTP · Parsing</code></sub> |
| <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/SearchEngine">🔍 SearchEngine</a></b><br/><sub>Tiny search engine: indexing, ranking, query parser.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ classical ranking still beats cosine similarity for explainability</i></sub><br/><sub><code>JavaScript · IR</code></sub> | <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/Stock_App_Flask">📈 Stock_App_Flask</a></b><br/><sub>Flask stock tracker + portfolio views. Market data + caching.</sub><br/><sub><i>↳ 90% of the work ended up in the caching layer, not the app</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Python · Flask · APIs</code></sub> |
